def analyze_data(items: list[dict]) -> dict:
    total = 0
    max_val = float("-inf")
    min_val = float("inf")
    count = 0

    for item in items:
        val = item["value"]
        total += val
        count += 1
        if val > max_val:
            max_val = val
        if val < min_val:
            min_val = val

    avg = total / count if count else 0
    above_avg = sum(1 for item in items if item["value"] > avg)

    return {"total": total, "avg": avg, "max": max_val, "min": min_val, "above_avg": above_avg}


def process_orders(orders: list) -> dict:
    revenue = 0
    tax = 0
    count = 0
    high_value = 0

    for o in orders:
        revenue += o.amount
        tax += o.tax
        count += 1
        if o.amount > 1000:
            high_value += 1

    avg_amount = revenue / count if count else 0
    return {"revenue": revenue, "tax": tax, "avg": avg_amount, "high_value": high_value}
